title: Evangelion Official Website News
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Official Website News             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 31, 2011 8:06 pm Since this isn't related to Studio Khara's Twitter, here, new thread. The official Evangelion website updated with the Newtype image of Asuka holding the Mark.06 Spear. http://www.evangelion.co.jp/ The links are just to the 1.0 and 2.0 Eva websites... For the longest time, the Eva website was the 2.0 website with an archive/link of the 1.0 website. But maybe this front page design update means we'll soon be getting some form of 3.0 news? I guess this means Anno wasn't lying with his "Please be patient" note in June 2011 Newtype Japan, then! Keep your fingers crossed, people!

[]:             Quote Post by cd603 » Tue May 31, 2011 8:40 pm The fact that it's same Asuka we saw on the cover of Newtype probably means that something will appear soon (maybe the within the next month?). But the picture is also saying that their not totally ready to reveal 3.0 news yet. Maybe their trying to ease us into it somehow? We're definitely on the edge of some kind of news though...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2011 9:59 pm HOLY SHIT! This might juuuuust be the very first, subtle signs of a beginning promotional campaign, or at least it... reassures one that the ppl at Khara are at least doing something, you know? Judging by the color scheme so far, 3.33 will get a yellow button and 4.44 a blue one cuz contrast. Think of the sea. Also, I SO want the Newtype interview translated now...

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue May 31, 2011 10:03 pm Not that I deliberately set out to argue EVERY LITTLE THING you say, but uh... Both those other buttons are red. I don't see blue being an option, they're not going for a full rainbow. Maybe green though. Anyway, now I'm going to continue being a stereotype for myself by saying that I hate that plugsuit. Seriously, why is it asymmetrical? She wasn't even wearing it during the Bardiel incident!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 31, 2011 10:12 pm Legendary wrote: Not that I deliberately set out to argue EVERY LITTLE THING you say, but uh... Both those other buttons are red.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2011 10:17 pm Legendary wrote: Not that I deliberately set out to argue EVERY LITTLE THING you say, but uh... Both those other buttons are red. I don't see blue being an option, they're not going for a full rainbow. Maybe green though. Anyway, now I'm going to continue being a stereotype for myself by saying that I hate that plugsuit. Seriously, why is it asymmetrical? She wasn't even wearing it during the Bardiel incident!

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue May 31, 2011 10:18 pm Orange red, actually. So "red" qualifies.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2011 10:20 pm Legendary wrote: Orange red, actually. So "red" qualifies.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue May 31, 2011 10:21 pm I was talking to SSD. You ninja'd me. :P

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Tue May 31, 2011 10:21 pm Kendrix wrote: @anyone who can read Japanese: Does any sort of "news page" say anything interesting?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2011 10:39 pm @Legendary: Uh, sorry. BTW, is there any sort of official page for the classic series? Was there ever one? It IS a bit weird that "Evangelion [dot] etc" basically directs you to one specific addition to the frachise and not to some sort of, uh, main page.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 31, 2011 11:04 pm It used to be a main page of sorts before the whole New Movie Edition thing started, now it's used as the official website for the movies. (I forget what exactly it had content-wise before NME was out, but I know something was there.)

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jun 01, 2011 8:19 am OH MY GOSH. A picture everyone knows appeared in the internet. THAT'S one good reason to start a new thread!

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 01, 2011 8:30 am Legendary wrote: Anyway, now I'm going to continue being a stereotype for myself by saying that I hate that plugsuit. Seriously, why is it asymmetrical? She wasn't even wearing it during the Bardiel incident!

[]:             Quote Post by Hatsumi92 » Wed Jun 01, 2011 3:34 pm robersora wrote: OH MY GOSH. A picture everyone knows appeared in the internet. THAT'S one good reason to start a new thread!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jun 01, 2011 5:38 pm @Hatsumi92 Still, nothing IMPORTANT changed yet. so... i think, this was reduntant.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Wed Jun 01, 2011 5:45 pm Nice, maybe we'll actually get some...like you know, news on 3.0 (maybe)

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Wed Jun 01, 2011 5:49 pm I'd love it if they promised BIG NEWS in a month only to reveal a reverse shot of that Asuka pic, with new mysterious tape on her ass to ponder over.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Jun 01, 2011 5:57 pm Warren Peace wrote: I'd love it if they promised BIG NEWS in a month only to reveal a reverse shot of that Asuka pic, with new mysterious tape on her ass to ponder over.

[]:             Quote Post by tomfrom994 » Thu Jun 02, 2011 12:46 pm Kendrix wrote: We're NOT going to argue about a shade of orange/red/purple/whatver now.
